title.en: Screws for Different Materials: Steel, Wood, Plastic, and Masonry
title.zh: 不同材料的螺丝：钢、木材、塑料和砖石
title.es: Tornillos para Diferentes Materiales: Acero, Madera, Plástico y Albañilería
title.ar: المسامير للمواد المختلفة: الفولاذ والخشب والبلاستيك والبناء
title.fr: Vis pour Différents Matériaux: Acier, Bois, Plastique et Maçonnerie
title.pt: Parafusos para Diferentes Materiais: Aço, Madeira, Plástico e Alvenaria
title.ru: Винты для Различных Материалов: Сталь, Дерево, Пластик и Кладка
title.ja: 異なる材料用のねじ：钢、木材、プラスチック、レンガ
title.de: Schrauben für Verschiedene Materialien: Stahl, Holz, Kunststoff und Mauerwerk
title.hi: विभिन्न सामग्रियों के लिए स्क्रू: स्टील, लकड़ी, प्लास्टिक और मोर्टार

description.en: Complete guide to selecting screws for different materials. Learn about self-tapping, wood screws, machine screws, and masonry screws for various applications.
description.zh: 不同材料螺丝选型完整指南。了解自攻螺丝、木螺丝、机螺丝和砖石螺丝的各种应用。
description.es: Guía completa para seleccionar tornillos para diferentes materiales. Aprenda sobre tornillos autorroscantes, tornillos para madera, tornillos machine y tornillos para mampostería.
description.ar: دليل شامل لاختيار المسامير للمواد المختلفة. تعلم عن المسامير ذاتية اللولبة ومسامير الخشب ومسامير الآلات ومسامير البناء.
description.fr: Guide complet pour sélectionner les vis pour différents matériaux. Apprenez les vis taraudeuses, vis à bois, vis mécaniques et vis de maçonnerie.
description.pt: Guia completo para selecionar parafusos para diferentes materiais. Aprenda sobre parafusos autoperfurantes, parafusos para madeira, parafusos de máquina e parafusos de alvenaria.
description.ru: Полное руководство по выбору винтов для различных материалов. Узнайте о самонарезающих, шурупах, machine винтах и кладке винтов.
description.ja: 異なる材料용 나사 선택의 완전한 가이드。자체 테이핑 나사, 목재 나사, 기계 나사, 그리고 벽돌 나사에 대해 알아보세요.
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden zur Auswahl von Schrauben für verschiedene Materialien. Erfahren Sie mehr über Blechschrauben, Holzschrauben, Maschinenschrauben.
description.hi: विभिन्न सामग्रियों के लिए स्क्रू चयन की पूर्ण गाइड। सेल्फ-टैपिंग, वुड स्क्रू, मशीन स्क्रू, और मेसनरी स्क्रू के बारे में जानें।

keywords: self-tapping screws, wood screws, machine screws, masonry screws, tapping screws, screw selection

body.en:
Self-tapping and self-drilling screws for steel:

1. Self-Tapping Screws (Type AB, B, C):
- Thread-forming for thin steel
- Requires pre-drilled pilot hole
- Type AB: Fine thread, thin metal
- Type B: Coarse thread, general purpose

2. Self-Drilling Screws (TEK screws):
- Drill point eliminates pilot hole
- Types: TEK 3, 4, 5 (drill capacity increases)
- Fastest installation

3. Machine Screws:
- Require pre-tapped holes or nuts
- UNC or UNF thread
- Used with hex nuts or in threaded holes

Screws designed for wood fastening:

1. Wood Screws:
- Coarse thread for wood grip
- Various head styles (flat, round, oval)
- Lengths: 3/4" to 6"
- Gauge: #2 to #16

2. Deck Screws:
- Coated for exterior use
- Star drive (T25) for less cam-out
- Self-countersinking head

3. Structural Wood Screws:
- Higher load capacity
- Approved for structural connections
- Often self-drilling points

Screws for concrete and masonry:

1. Concrete Screws (Tapcons):
- Requires pre-drilled hole
- Thread design cuts into concrete
- Various lengths and diameters

2. Masonry Nails:
- Hardened steel
- Drive into mortar and concrete
- Quick installation
- Lower load capacity

3. sleeve Anchors (see Concrete Anchors guide)
- Expansion anchor principle
- Higher loads than concrete screws
